title: borckhausenia capnoides

constituents: Borckhausenia capnoides has many active constituents, such as alkaloids, glycosides, flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been found to exhibit a range of medicinal properties. These include anti-inflammatory compounds like borckhaussianin, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and reduce pain, as well as antioxidants like kaempferol, which can protect against cell damage and improve overall health.
